paper.title_en: Charged parallel spinors and applications to mass--charge inequalities
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the equality case of the spin positive mass theorem with charge in the Riemannian setting. This leads naturally to the notion of charged parallel spinor, which plays a central role in the analysis of extremal charged manifolds. As an application, we characterize the equality case of the mass--charge inequality in terms of the extremal Reissner--Nordström geometry for asymptotically flat manifolds with connected boundary and for manifolds with a single asymptotically cylindrical end.
